title: dorycnium suffruticosum proles germanicum
intro: Dorycnium suffruticosum proles germanicum, also known as German kidney vetch, is a perennial legume native to Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat kidney and bladder issues due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. It is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, German kidney vetch is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
